creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
Well, if you can capture packets leading up to
the crash, that would be useful.
# tcpdump -s 0 -w out.pcap host <nfs-client>
would do it, if the Linux server has tcpdump on it.

Then do whatever causes the <nfs-client> to crash.

If you can do this, you can email me the out.pcap as
an attachment, to rmacklem@uoguelph.ca.
